<!--
Thanks for submitting a pull request.

Please provide enough context for maintainers and contributors to review the change efficiently.

Before submitting, please make sure the following is done when relevant:

1. Read CONTRIBUTING.md.
2. Keep the pull request focused and avoid unrelated refactors.
3. Run the checks that apply to your change, such as:
   - pnpm lint
   - pnpm format:check
   - pnpm rust:fmt:check
   - pnpm rust:check
   - node build.cjs
4. Add screenshots or recordings if the pull request changes the UI.
5. Do not include secrets, private credentials, signing materials, or production-only configuration.
-->

## Summary

<!--
What changed, and why?
What problem does this pull request solve?
-->

## How did you test this change?

<!--
List the exact commands you ran, the manual checks you performed, and any screenshots or recordings that help verify the change.
If you did not run tests or checks, explain why.
-->

<!--
Optional, but strongly recommended for UI or workflow changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] I read `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] I kept this pull request focused and avoided unrelated changes.
- [ ] I ran the checks or validations relevant to this change, or explained why I could not.
- [ ] I did not include secrets, credentials, or other sensitive production-only material.
